name: Bhai Jagmohan & Harmohan Singh (Delhi)
body: Bhai Jagmohan Singh and Bhai Harmohan Singh Ji are the sons of Bhai Nanak Singh Ji from Delhi. Both brothers are very talented and currently they are residing in the US. If anyone has more information or recordings of theirs to share, please contact us.
